statement: In every magma, Equation 2581 (`x = (y * ((z * x) * w)) * z`) implies Equation 444 (`x = x * (y * (y * (z * z)))`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0092
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op y (op (op z x) w)) z)) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op x (op y (op y (op z z))))
